item.title: Dinkum – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition now available; ‘The Great Bite’ update now available for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

A free upgrade from the Switch version.

Publisher KRAFTON and developer James Bendon have released a Nintendo Switch 2 Edition of Dinkum via Nintendo eShop alongside the release of the “Animal Tracks” update for both Switch and Switch 2, the companies. The Switch 2 version is available as a free upgrade from the Switch version.

“I grew up playing Nintendo games, so bringing a game I created to a Nintendo platform is incredibly meaningful to me,” said Dinkum creator James Bendon in a press release. “The creativity of the Dinkum community continues to inspire me, and I’m excited to keep growing this world with players.”

For the PC (Steam) version, which is celebrating the first anniversary since its full release, KRAFTON has released “The Great Bite” update, which adds a new destination to explore. Here is an overview of the update, via KRAFTON:

Alongside its Nintendo Switch 2 debut, Dinkum is also celebrating its first anniversary on Steam with “The Great Bite,” a major content update featuring a brand-new destination to explore. The island introduces climbable cliffs, new plant life, and varied terrain, opening up new ways to explore the world of Dinkum. Players can also restore scattered lighthouses to reveal nearby treasure on the map.

The update also adds new decorative items, collectibles, and vehicles, along with several quality-of-life and customization features. A new Servo feature allows players to summon vehicles from anywhere, while new facial accessories and the Swag Pack customization system offer even more ways to personalize characters.

To mark the game’s first anniversary on Steam, Dinkum will also host a limited-time in-game event. Through May 7, Steam players who sell fish to John’s Goods will receive commemorative tickets that can be exchanged for exclusive items.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/dinkum-nintendo-switch-2-edition-now-available-the-great-bite-update-now-available-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Possessor(s) coming to Switch 2 on April 29
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Currently available for PlayStation 5 and PC.

Publisher Devolver Digital and developer Heart Machine will release side-scrolling action adventure game Possessor(s) for Switch 2 on April 29, the companies announced.

Possessor(s) first launched for PlayStation 5 and PC via Steam on November 11, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via Devolver Digital:

About

In Possessor(s) you play as Luca, a high-schooler trapped in the ruins of Sanzu City, a sprawling metropolis overrun with otherworldly horrors following an interdimensional catastrophe. Her body broken, Luca strikes a deal with Rhem, a newly freed demon in need of a host. Together, they make a last-ditch effort to survive.

Possessor(s) combines elements of platform fighters and Metroidvanias, offering stylish combat and exploration with a focus on juggling, aerial combos, and improvised weapons like kitchen knives, a guitar, and a computer mouse.

As Luca and Rhem learn to co-exist, they’ll develop new skills to help them navigate a huge, interconnected city while exploring different districts, each with unique challenges and atmosphere. Possessor(s) also explores themes of codependency, loss, and survival as Luca searches for her mother and best friend in the ruins of Sanzu.

Key Features

  • A Fractured World – Possessor(s) takes place across the interconnected sprawl of a destroyed mega-city, from collapsed skyscrapers to an abandoned aquarium, all riddled with secrets. Hauntingly beautiful 3D environments form a stunning backdrop over which hand-drawn and animated characters, and mysterious science-fiction horror action take center stage.
  • A Complex Narrative – Choose multiple paths in an open-ended world structure as you look to uncover the truth behind the catastrophe. Meet a cast of engaging characters, each with their own heart-breaking story to follow in the aftermath of the devastation.
  • A Precision Engagement – Gameplay is centered around tight, fast-paced platforming with a range of unique movement abilities that extend to its tense, precise combat. Balance ground and air attacks, replete with combos and juggles as you encounter a variety of deadly enemies, and challenging bosses. Find and unlock a wide array of powerful weapons and upgrades to bolster your arsenal and explore previously inaccessible areas.

Watch a new trailer below.

Switch 2 Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/possessors-coming-to-switch-2-on-april-29
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
